component.name: zh-en Translator
component.summary: Offline popup translator for Chinese text

description.p: Offline-first Chinese to English translator. Press the configurable hotkey to translate selected text or clipboard images instantly, with no internet required.

ul.li: CC-CEDICT dictionary with inline word-level lookup and pinyin
Argos MT offline sentence translation (no cloud, no API key)
Tesseract OCR for translating text in screenshots and images
Domain glossaries: manufacturing, medical, legal, electronics (1,500+ terms)
Sidebar mode for continuous reading workflows

description.p: First Linux release. Adds XDG autostart, Linux Tesseract path detection, platform-aware OCR waterfall, and Flatpak packaging.
